aries.name: Aries
aries.description: Aries charges forward with unstoppable energy and fearless confidence. Your spirit is magnetic, your instincts razor-sharp, and your courage inspires everyone around you.
aries.shadow: Impulsive, quick to anger, struggles to slow down

taurus.name: Taurus
taurus.tagline: Grounded, loyal, and built to last
taurus.description: Taurus moves through the world with steady grace and unshakable resolve. You build things that last — relationships, wealth, and beauty — because you understand that true value takes time.
taurus.shadow: Stubborn, resistant to change, prone to possessiveness

gemini.name: Gemini
gemini.description: Gemini moves through the world at the speed of thought. You are the bridge between ideas and people — a natural communicator who sees every side of every story.

cancer.name: Cancer
cancer.description: Cancer leads with the heart. Your emotional intelligence is extraordinary — you sense what others need before they say it, and your loyalty creates a safe harbor for everyone you love.
cancer.shadow: Moody, overly protective, difficulty letting go

leo.name: Leo
leo.description: Leo commands every room with warmth and authority. Your generosity is legendary, your creativity is boundless, and your heart is bigger than you let on. You are here to lead with love.

virgo.name: Virgo
virgo.description: Virgo sees what everyone else misses. Your ability to find the exact problem and craft the exact solution is unmatched. You serve not from weakness, but from a deep understanding that mastery creates beauty.

libra.name: Libra
libra.description: Libra seeks beauty in all things — in art, in relationships, in justice. You have a rare gift for seeing both sides, and your ability to create harmony turns conflict into connection.
libra.shadow: Indecisive, avoids conflict at all costs, people-pleasing

scorpio.name: Scorpio
scorpio.description: Scorpio goes where others fear to look. Your depth of feeling and your ability to transform through crisis makes you one of the most powerful forces in the zodiac. You don't just survive — you evolve.

sagittarius.name: Sagittarius
sagittarius.description: Sagittarius aims at the horizon and keeps moving. Your optimism is infectious, your honesty is legendary, and your need for truth drives you toward the biggest questions — and the grandest adventures.

capricorn.name: Capricorn
capricorn.tagline: Disciplined, ambitious, and built to endure
capricorn.description: Capricorn plays the long game — and wins. Your discipline is titanium, your ambition is quiet but unstoppable, and the structures you build — in life, work, and love — are designed to outlast everything.
capricorn.shadow: Cold, workaholic, struggles to show vulnerability

aquarius.name: Aquarius
aquarius.tagline: Original, humanitarian, ahead of your time
aquarius.description: Aquarius sees the future. Your mind works in dimensions others haven't discovered yet, and your dedication to progress — for yourself and for humanity — makes you one of the most quietly revolutionary forces alive.

pisces.name: Pisces
pisces.description: Pisces swims between worlds. You feel what others cannot sense, dream what others cannot see, and love with a depth that dissolves all boundaries. Your compassion is your superpower — and your wisdom.
pisces.shadow: Escapist, overly trusting, absorbs others' emotions
